name: pentacle
description: tmux session dashboard with embedded terminals

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Pentacle spawns Claude Code and Codex agents that use AppleScript to access Contacts, Messages, Calendar, Notes, and Mail.
extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and search your macOS Contacts.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and create Calendar events.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and create Calendar events.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle may read and create Reminders.
extendInfo.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle may read and create Reminders.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle capture webcam snapshots and video.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle record and transcribe audio.
extendInfo.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and analyze photos from the library.
extendInfo.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle save generated images to the photo library.
extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle transcribe speech locally and via Apple Speech.
extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle use location for weather, maps, and context.
extendInfo.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Agents running inside Pentacle use location for background tasks.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle discover and connect to nearby Bluetooth devices.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle discover and connect to nearby Bluetooth devices.
extendInfo.NSMotionUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read motion sensors.
extendInfo.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read the Apple Music library.
extendInfo.NSHomeKitUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle control HomeKit accessories.
extendInfo.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle authenticate with Face ID / Touch ID.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and write files in Desktop.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and write files in Documents.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read and write files in Downloads.
extendInfo.NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle access files on network volumes.
extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle access files on removable volumes.
extendInfo.NSFileProviderDomainUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle access cloud-synced files.
extendInfo.NSFileProviderPresenceUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read cloud-sync presence info.
extendInfo.NSSystemAdministrationUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle may perform admin tasks.
extendInfo.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle do not use cross-app tracking.
extendInfo.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle discover and communicate with devices on the local network.
extendInfo.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle read Focus status.
extendInfo.NSNearbyInteractionUsageDescription: Agents running inside Pentacle use Nearby Interaction.
